tables.name: addresses
tables.description: Client mailing and residential locations used for city, state, county, ZIP, and country analysis.

tables.name: calendar_days
tables.description: Calendar reference records for daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly, and fiscal reporting.

tables.name: client_profiles
tables.description: Client demographic segments such as gender, marital status, education, credit rating, and dependents.

tables.name: clients
tables.description: Shopper account records connecting people to addresses, demographics, purchases, returns, and tenure.

tables.name: clock_times
tables.description: Time-of-day reference records used to analyze activity by hour, minute, second, shift, and meal period.

tables.name: delivery_methods
tables.description: Shipping and delivery method reference records, including carrier, service type, and contract.

tables.name: fulfillment_centers
tables.description: Fulfillment center locations used for stock storage and order shipment.

tables.name: household_profiles
tables.description: Household-level segments including income range, buying potential, dependents, and vehicle ownership.

tables.name: income_ranges
tables.description: Income range bands used to classify households into economic tiers.

tables.name: mail_order_purchases
tables.description: Purchases made through the mail-order channel, including pricing, discounts, shipping, and profitability.

tables.name: mail_order_refunds
tables.description: Returned purchases from the mail-order channel, including refund amounts, return reasons, and client roles.

tables.name: mailer_pages
tables.description: Catalog or mailer page records used to analyze print-assisted shopping journeys.

tables.name: marketing_campaigns
tables.description: Campaign and offer records used to analyze promoted sales across channels.

tables.name: merchandise
tables.description: Product catalog records describing items sold by the business, including brand, category, color, size, and pricing.

tables.name: online_properties
tables.description: Website or digital commerce property records used for online-channel analysis.

tables.name: online_purchases
tables.description: Online purchases, including pricing, discounts, shipping, and profitability details.

tables.name: online_refunds
tables.description: Returned purchases from the online channel, including refund amounts, return reasons, and client roles.

tables.name: retail_locations
tables.description: Physical store locations and operating attributes for retail-channel analysis.

tables.name: return_reasons
tables.description: Reference records describing why an item was returned.

tables.name: site_pages
tables.description: Online page records used to analyze website pages, content volume, and access timing.

tables.name: stock_levels
tables.description: Product stock counts by merchandise item, fulfillment center, and calendar day.

tables.name: store_purchases
tables.description: Item-level purchases made in physical stores, including pricing, discounts, tax, and profit.

tables.name: store_refunds
tables.description: Returned purchases from physical stores, including refund amounts, reasons, and client details.

tables.name: support_centers
tables.description: Customer service and support center locations used to analyze assisted commerce operations.
